name: handoff
description: Session continuity in a single command — /handoff detects the session state and routes. SAVE: an extractor reads the session transcript (and teammates' transcripts when a clã/Agent Team is active) and mechanically generates a verbatim chronological ata (LOG-<sessão>.md with stable item ids), then Claude writes only the thematic PRD at {project_root}/.claude/HANDOFF.md referencing those ids; a Stop-hook completeness gate blocks until every strong item is covered. RESUME: rehydrates from the PRD. Optional [salvar|retomar] argument forces the mode.
